close_reason: Intentional: the adapter is not a backend and does not participate in URI dispatch. Users depend on secretx-signature directly.
description: The secretx umbrella crate (secretx/Cargo.toml) lists every backend as an optional dep with a matching feature gate (aws-kms, local-signing, etc.), but secretx-signature is not listed at all — no dep, no feature. What goes wrong: users who add only `secretx` to their Cargo.toml have no path to get the signature adapters through the umbrella; they must discover and add a separate `secretx-signature` dependency. This breaks the workspace's established pattern where the umbrella is the single entry point. A user following the secretx docs/examples who enables `local-signing` and wants to bridge to signature::Signer will not find it. Fix: add secretx-signature as an optional dep in secretx/Cargo.toml with a `signature` (or `signature-adapters`) feature gate.
title: secretx-signature absent from umbrella crate
